code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    mut out = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < tokens.len()
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        if string.is_empty(out)
          out = "#{t} #{t}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{t} #{t}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
